title: cavanilla umbellata
intro: Cavanilla umbellata, also known as Vanilla planifolia, is a flowering plant of the orchid family and the sole species within the genus Vanilla. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, and its essential oil has been used to alleviate nausea and vomiting. The health benefits of Cavanilla umbellata include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Cavanilla umbellata include vanilla extract, which is used in culinary and aromatherapy applications.
